ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the property */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the property owner */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the property owner or management */,
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property type */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "total_floors" INTEGER /* Total number of floors in the property */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last property inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_property_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rooms" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property it belongs to */,
  "room_name" TEXT /* Name of the room (e.g., Bedroom, Bathroom) */,
  "level" TEXT /* Floor level of the room (e.g., 3rd floor, 4th floor) */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the room (length x width) */,
  "flooring_type" TEXT /* Type of flooring in the room (e.g., Wood, Ceramic tiles) */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Any additional information about the room */,
  "ceiling_height" REAL /* Height of the ceiling in the room */,
  "window_count" INTEGER /* Number of windows in the room */,
  "door_count" INTEGER /* Number of doors in the room */,
  "is_accessible" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the room is wheelchair accessible */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the room details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rooms_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance request */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the room associated with the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance request was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the request (e.g., Pending, Completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance issue */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the request (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the request */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated date by which the request should be completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_requests_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., admin, maintenance staff) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the property */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the user has access to */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user can edit property details */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user can view property details */,
  "can_delete" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user can delete property details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "room_maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the room where maintenance was performed */,
  "maintainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the maintenance performed */,
  "estimated_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the maintenance */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_room_maintenance_logs_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_room_maintenance_logs_maintainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintainer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "property_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type (e.g., Apartment, House) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "is_residential" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the property type is residential */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property inspected */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the inspection */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the inspection */,
  "report" TEXT /* Detailed report of the inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "room_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the room the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., Air Conditioning, Fireplace) */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_room_features_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id")
)
